COUNTY SHERIFF OFFICE REPORTS A MUDSLIDE OCCURRED AT THE INTERSECTION OF HIGHWAY 321 AND KIRBY MOUNTAIN ROAD SOMETIME TOWARD MID EVENING AS FLOODING CONTINUED ACROSS A LARGE PART OF NORTHERN CALDWELL COUNTY. THE MUDSLIDE CAME ACROSS THE ROADWAY AND ONLY HINDERED TRAVEL FOR A WHILE. MANY ROADS NEAR THE WILKES COUNTY BORDER WERE CLOSED IN THE MID TO LATE EVENING ESPECIALLY LOCATIONS CLOSE TO KINGS CREEK.
